title: Soul Taker
description: Rename A Sword "Soul Taker" (Better Version Of Curse Slayer)
body:
When You Rename A Sword "Soul Taker" You Will Get A Cooler Purper Looking Sword A Sword Better Than Curse Slayer

The pack requires OptiFine, which can be downloaded here : 
https://optifine.net/home

Or, if you're playing on Fabric, this pack requires CIT Resewn : 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn
